## Muc tieu

- [ ] Mo ta ngan gon ly do thay doi
- [ ] Link issue/task lien quan (neu co)

## Loai thay doi

- [ ] Fix bug
- [ ] Feature moi
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Docs/CI

## Danh sach kiem tra truoc merge

- [ ] Da pull/rebase tu `main` moi nhat
- [ ] Khong commit secret (`.env`, token, key)
- [ ] Khong commit artifact generated (`frontend/dist`, `frontend/build`, file resolved)
- [ ] Backend test pass (`cd backend && npm test -- --passWithNoTests`)
- [ ] Frontend test pass (`cd frontend && npm test`)
- [ ] Frontend build pass (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] Da test tay luong chinh lien quan
- [ ] Da cap nhat README/docs neu thay doi contract/cach chay
